use_cases: Landing page hero sections for tech and SaaS companies seeking a modern, dynamic first impression
Product launches requiring engaging visual animations to capture user attention
Portfolio or showcase websites needing immersive particle background effects
Developer tool landing pages wanting futuristic, interactive hero experiences
ai_summary: Aether Flow Hero is a dark-themed landing page hero component featuring an interactive HTML5 canvas with particle animation that responds to mouse movement. The component uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and includes glass-morphism styled content cards with gradient accents. It creates an immersive, futuristic experience ideal for tech-focused websites, with particles that scatter on mouse hover and a clean layout showcasing key value propositions with CTA buttons.
